response.global_summary: A video featuring Hololive English - Justice branch VTubers (Raora, Cecilia, Gigi, and Elizabeth) participating in a game show hosted by a character named Smokey. No vocal music is present in the video; the audio consists entirely of dialogue and game show sound effects.

scenes.description: A group of VTubers playing a game show in a 3D setting, answering trivia questions presented by a floating cube character named Smokey. The audio is dialogue and game show ambient sounds.
